subject: WM-0067 review: changes_requested
body: High: scenario uses one shared fixture/timeline for prevention, containment and failure. It confirms Chronicle identity, fulfills lamp-oil obligation, and records town-rule compliance before activating containment/failure candidates that were registered earlier with stale unconfirmed identity basis; the summary therefore shows harm after the same authoritative prevention facts. Split branch fixtures or rebuild/register activation candidates from branch-specific owner states before activation. Required checks pass.
